description.value: An invisible cone of despair causes great sadness in the subjects. Each affected creature takes a -2 penalty on attack rolls, saving throws, ability checks, skill checks, and weapon damage rolls. Crushing despair counters and dispels good hope. Editor’s Note: If using Good Hope – Crushing Despair by Orphaned Bookworm Productions, this spell becomes a despair effect and uses the despair conditions. See crushing despair (modified).
